title: abutilon avicennae f. tiliifolium
intro: Abutilon avicennae f. tiliifolium, also known as the Indian mallow or West African mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon avicennae f. tiliifolium include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Abutilon avicennae f. tiliifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
